Anjana Panwar, (iii) Shri Ram Singh Balmiki, (iv) Shri Raj Kumar Pathi, (v) Shri Hansraj Narwale, (vi) Kumari Mamta Dhika". [F. No. 19014/66/13-SCD-IV] U. VENKATESWARLU, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O. 89 (E), dated the 13th January, 2014 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 605 (E), dated the 28th February, 2014, number S.O. 2008(E), dated the 7th August, 2014 and S.O. 476 (E), dated 16"' February, 2017.
